title: More Mob Variants x Fresh Animations - Extensions
description: Adds Fresh Animations Details add-on compatibility to the More Mob Variants mod.
body:
### What's this resourcepack?
This resource pack adds compatibility with the FA Details resource pack when using the More Mob Variants mod.

### For more compatibility
You can disable the sheep horns (which overlap the ears and horns in FA) with the "sheep-compatibility.zip" file, located in the Files section of the latest version page. You can use [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi) to load the datapack into all worlds.

If you need to remove the hostile mobs variations, use this datapack: [More Mob Variants - No hostile mobs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-mob-variants-no-hostile-mobs)

### Features
I used the latest version of More Mob Variants x Fresh Animations, edited the textures of these mobs:
- Chicken: combs and tails
- Cow: ears and tails.
- Pig: ears, some have tusks, and muddy pigs.
- Sheep: ears and horns.

And compatibility with this mobs:
- Cat
- Wolf
- Skeleton
- Spider
- Zombie

### Setting

![Resourcepacks order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c58a6a33b0f0817f1fa979f8a99d0da5af57444a.jpeg)

### Extra info
Works with these versions of Minecraft and the More Mob Variants mod:

- 1.20.1-1.20.3: with version 1.3.1 - Fabric 1.20.1
- 1.20.4: with version 1.3.1 - Fabric 1.20.4
- 1.21-1.21.1: with version 1.3.1.1 - Fabric 1.21


### All credits to the creators [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) and [nyuppo](https://modrinth.com/user/nyuppo)

Links to the original projects:
